{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320165628F16119FDB0EA94CAF147"}"},"total":9450},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7540916359338263321","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的特别好，男女主互换灵魂的题材，爽文，坏人下线也很快，女主超级棒，有很多谋略，而且为女子做了很多好事，男主也在一直成长，男女主的第一次竟然没换回来，孩子也是男主生的，嘿嘿嘿，头一次看到这种的，挺新奇的，祝愿她们一直幸福[送心][送心][送心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1755757311,"group_id":"7277177500709424169","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"超懒～","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxTP242F73+qB/qLfCNLCWg=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d8c7c5c405b94be3bce49236e27648b1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776531499&x-signature=l7ZkZxEaUxUFQI%2BmEW1JOlnVFc4%3D","user_id":"110228797111","user_name":" 奶兔叽^O^～"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"110228797111","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7277177500709424169","book_info":{"abstract":"【灵魂互换＋穿书＋甜宠搞笑＋发疯＋暴君＋爽文＋双洁】
云窈窈穿书了，穿成没活过第一章的愚笨懦弱炮灰。
无妨，家人设计害我，那我就刺杀皇帝诛了自家九族！
谁知弑完君，云窈窈悲催地发现，她和暴君互换了身体！
一场弑君事件，让身为皇帝的涂山烬穿到了女人身上，还因弑君被打入水牢！
他满身寒意，决定伺机灭了那妖孽，却被她纳入后宫。
心怀鬼胎的两人被迫达成了短暂合作。
可两人发现，对方总能够轻易解决掉各自的麻烦。
云窈窈当皇帝：发挥个人魅力，收服忠臣，体恤百姓，稳固江山，谁招她，她就不按常理出牌干谁！
涂山烬成宠妃：身体太弱，我练！家人太贱，我灭！谁敢作妖，我撕！谁惹他，都得死！
【又名：窑山夫妇的恋爱、执政日常~】","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/1c0e3abd2c0492dedd1e222ca6a0b03c","author":"小胖子快跑","author_id":"","book_id":"7277177500709424169","book_name":"与暴君互换后，她开局诛自己九族","book_short_name":"与君互换","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#a00000","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":253,"name":"古言脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=253&name=古言脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":702,"name":"双洁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=702&name=双洁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7277178364442444300","read_count":"30533","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"371164"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"146","tags":"古言脑洞,古代言情,穿越,甜宠,穿书,双洁,搞笑轻松","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/af5fc5aebdc60c55297cdf5c38fa7322~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779180988&x-signature=HvyLtCRAHfErKJMT5J2f%2FV%2BflUM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"430606224726887","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"151"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320165628F16119FDB0EA94CAF147"}"},"relate_info_lis
